clusters.justification: These terms reflect the broad domain of processing autonomic arousal, emotional valence, and homeostatic physiological states largely subserved by insular, amygdalar, and anterior cingulate co-activations.
This cluster captures the computation of subjective utility, incentive salience, and reinforcement learning robustly mapped onto frontostriatal and dopaminergic midbrain circuitries.
These terms rely heavily on the default mode network to support internally directed simulations, mapping the internal mental states of both the self and others.
